calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Defendant'S Name On Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNFUND CCR PARTNERS' Motion To Amend Defendant'S Name On Judgment And Renewal Of Judgment.

Judgment creditor Unfund CCR Partners' motion to amend the defendant's name on the judgment and renewal of judgment is granted. The name "Yessica E. Vargas" shall be added as an additional name of the judgment debtor on the judgment and renewal of judgment.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
